title: Tender Crunchy Indian Peanut Vada Pav
description: A light and flavorful street food inspired dish from the state of Andhra Pradesh, India, featuring roasted peanuts and a soffritto-based filling, served in a crispy Vada Pav bun.

ingredients.name: Oil
ingredients.notes: Any neutral oil with a high smoke point, such as avocado or grapeseed.

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the onion, ginger, and garlic and saut5 until the onion is translucent.
Add the green chilies and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cilantro and lemon juice and stir well.
In a separate bowl, mix together the chickpea flour, bread crumbs, and salt.
Add the roasted peanut mixture to the chickpea flour mixture and stir well.
Add the mixture to the pan and stir well.
Shape the mixture into small patties.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Fry the patties until they are golden brown and crispy.
Serve the fried patties in a Vada Pav bun with your choice of chutneys and sauces.
